business_ideas.idea: Content to commerce: Use niche media publication to presell physical products to engaged ultra-wealthy audience.
Underutilized car asset: Self-driving cars that earn money as autonomous taxis when owner doesn't need them.
Specialized talent marketplace: Ocean's 11 model with pods of highly skilled freelancers on-demand for projects.
Nightclub day conversion: Use nightclub spaces as fitness studios/bars during day to double facility utilization.
Pool rental by hour: Rent residential swimming pools to neighbors by the hour for revenue sharing.
Clean structured data marketplace: Organize company transaction/procurement data and sell to aggregators/hedge funds.
